Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\({path:''.env.local''}\); console.log\(''KEY exists:'', !!process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\); console.log\(''KEY length:'', process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY?.length\); console.log\(''First 10:'', process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY?.substring\(0,10\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const lines=fs.readFileSync\(''.env.local'',''utf8''\).split\(''\\n''\); const key=lines.find\(l=>l.startsWith\(''ANTHROPIC_API_KEY''\)\); console.log\(''Line:'', JSON.stringify\(key\)\); const val=key?.split\(''=''\)[1]; console.log\(''Value length:'', val?.length\); console.log\(''First 15:'', val?.substring\(0,15\)\)")
